site.name: Maniatiko
site.description: Maniatiko — hypnotic industrial techno producer and DJ from Santiago, Chile.

sections.title: Origin
sections.subtitle: Architecture of mental tension
items: Producer and DJ born in Santiago, Chile, focused on developing his own vision within industrial techno. His work emerges from a deeply personal quest — built upon his experiences, ear, artistic maturity and inner growth — shaping a new sonic language: a collision between Bochka pressure, hypnotic grooves, tectonic energy and a constant, dark, immersive and destructive propulsion in its impact.

His music is built upon an architecture of mental tension, physical intensity and emotional memory. Each production stems from his own lived experiences, processed and transfigured into sonic matter: distorted textures, abrasive percussion, dense atmospheres and repetitive structures that lead to prolonged hypnosis — making you feel like you're part of his story.

Within the Chilean underground scene he has become a recurring figure, sharing stages with Aldes, Kask4r, 19.85, Mary B, Likikon, Bonek and Lurtz. His presence reflects an expanding identity, marked by intense sonic exploration — both mental and physical — where darkness functions not only as aesthetic but as emotional, bodily and ritualistic territory.

mixes.title: LA MELODÍA DE LA DESESPERACIÓN

mixes.title: VIOLENCIA INTRAFAMILIAR
mixes.description: Physical intensity. Hard kicks. No contemplation.

memories.anecdote: Sunrise found us still pushing. The kick wouldn't stop.
The room held its breath until the drop. Then nothing was the same.
They asked for one more hour. We gave them three.

press.quote: Constant, dark, immersive propulsion. He doesn't play: he pushes.
Bochka pressure pushed to the limit. Prolonged hypnosis as physical territory.
Part of the new generation redrawing Chilean techno.

footer.epitaph: † The ritual doesn't end. It only changes form †
